close_reason: Fixed in a87e425: default browser bundle now ships compiler + raw sources so the worker recompiles edits in-VM (IDE parity). make test green.
description: Browser-only refactor made the shell request a non-draft bundle (dashboard.lua builds bundle_url without ?draft=1). But collect_compiler_sources and include_sources are gated behind opts.draft, so the in-VM compiler modules and raw .fuwa sources never reach the browser worker. require(runtime.stdlib.compiler.package_web) fails -> live reload dead. Fix: always ship compiler+sources for the browser bundle (browser-only is now default and requires in-VM compile, like IDE).
title: Browser-only shell: ship compiler+sources in non-draft bundle for live reload

description: Uptrace in infra/docker-compose/observability.yml restarts immediately because /etc/uptrace/config.yml is not mounted and the compose stack has no PostgreSQL service. Dev/prod observability is still useful for Vector/ClickHouse/VictoriaMetrics, but Uptrace is not actually healthy yet.
title: Fix Uptrace in fuwa infra compose

description: Default browser editing in fuwa should behave like /IDE: editor change -> in-memory session update -> debounced worker run -> tenant DOM swap. Quarantine draft/publish/server persistence behind a legacy editor-server-mode boundary and remove those semantics from the default shell path.
title: Isolate browser editor mode from server draft/publish path
